pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Yazi (means "duck") is a terminal file manager written in Rust, based on non-blocking async I/O. It provides an efficient, user-friendly, and highly customizable file management experience with built-in image preview, syntax highlighting, archive browsing, and a Lua plugin system.
Ships two binaries: yazi (the file manager) and ya (the CLI helper for inter-instance communication and package management).
